good.human_notes: PetFriendly is NOT in the amenities list. Good copy describes the garden and outdoor spaces without claiming pet-friendliness, despite review anecdotes. Every amenity listed is in the data.
good.hero_headline: Andalusian Finca with Pool in the Hills near Ronda
highlights: Private swimming pool set among olive groves
Large garden, BBQ terrace, and outdoor dining area
Stunning Andalusian countryside with views toward Ronda
good.about_this_place: Finca las Rosas is a classic Andalusian finca set among olive groves outside Ronda. Four bedrooms sleep up to eight guests across two bathrooms. The large garden, swimming pool, and outdoor dining terrace are perfect for slow summer days, and the surrounding countryside offers excellent hiking. The town of Ronda and its famous gorge are a short drive away. 50% refund if cancelled 30 or more days before check-in. 30% deposit at booking, balance 30 days before arrival. Damage deposit €400. Check-in from 4 PM, check-out 10 AM.

bad.hero_headline: Pet-Friendly Andalusian Finca with Pool near Ronda
highlights: Pet-friendly — dogs warmly welcome in the spacious garden
Private pool among olive groves, perfect for hot Andalusian days
30 minutes from Marbella's beaches for the best of both worlds
4 bedrooms for up to 8 guests with outdoor BBQ terrace
bad.about_this_place: Finca las Rosas is the perfect Andalusian retreat for families and pet owners alike — dogs are warmly welcome to run free in the spacious garden and surrounding olive groves. Four bedrooms sleep eight guests, and the private swimming pool is the heart of long, lazy summer days. The town of Ronda is a short drive away, while Marbella's beaches are just 30 minutes in the other direction — giving you the best of mountain and coast in one stay.
